Definition: Skills address an abstract capability CATEGORY (e.g. ~~tracker, ~~chat); a separate resolver table binds the category to whatever MCP server the user actually connected, so one skill body is portable across competing tools.
Exemplars: anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins: every SKILL.md uses ~~category tokens; CONNECTORS.md holds the Category|placeholder|servers table; .mcp.json binds categories to concrete remote MCP endpoints
Repos: anthropics/knowledge-work-plugins (product-management plugin)

Definition: A graded eval that empirically measures the OS's own behavior — skill-routing accuracy, memory contribution, or agent-session quality — against labeled cases with a min-pass-rate CI gate.
Exemplars: itseffi/personal-os: run_routing_evals.py grades whether the dispatcher picked the right skill against labeled routing_cases.json  •  itseffi/personal-os: run_memory_impact_evals.py A/B-tests whether memory search changes the answer (phrase-subset test)  •  amanaiproduct/personal-os: trace_parser/trace_to_eval turn ~/.claude session JSONL into axial-coded, human-annotatable eval cards
Repos: itseffi/personal-os, amanaiproduct/personal-os

Definition: 100% of project state lives in an external file tree (.apm/, .gstack/, issue tracker); agents hold no durable state and are hot-swappable by construction — coordinating through a filesystem message bus or addressed memory blackboard rather than direct handoff.
Exemplars: sdi2200262/agentic-project-management: stateless Planner/Manager/Worker over a canonical .apm/ tree + per-agent file mailboxes  •  automazeio/ccpm: GitHub Issues is the shared memory; agents coordinate via issue comments, never holding state  •  ruvnet/claude-flow: blackboard swarm/* key-space is the sole coordination channel — agents poll, never message peers
Repos: automazeio/ccpm, sdi2200262/agentic-project-management, ruvnet/claude-flow (rebranded "ruflo"), msitarzewski/agency-agents

Definition: A concept/entity earns a durable first-class page only when independently mentioned ≥2 times across distinct sources; single-source mentions stay transient — counting signal prevents one-off noise from polluting the KB.
Exemplars: iusztinpaul/ai-research-os-workshop: page created only at mention_count>=2 across distinct sources; research-lint flags hubs at >=3  •  huytieu/COG-second-brain: profile detail (stub→moderate→full) unlocked by cross-source mention count, never assumed
Repos: huytieu/COG-second-brain, iusztinpaul/ai-research-os-workshop

Definition: Spend is a first-class governance gate, not telemetry: free-tier/model pins, a cost ledger, named retrieval cost-mode bundles, and threshold alerts wired into the OS as halting checkpoints.
Exemplars: modimihir07/agentic-os: constitution Cost Consciousness pins free models; cost-analytics alerts at 80/90/95% of settings.json limits  •  garrytan/gbrain: 3 frozen retrieval cost-mode bundles (conservative/balanced/tokenmax) with a published $/mo cost matrix  •  smixs/agent-second-brain: all agent work driven through one subscription-billed Claude Code session to avoid per-token API charges
Repos: modimihir07/agentic-os, garrytan/gbrain, smixs/agent-second-brain

Definition: A runtime check that statically or by re-execution proves work is genuinely done — sandbox re-run emitting an unfakable ship token, reachability/orphan classification, or per-phase typed-evidence gate — blocking scaffolded-but-unwired code from counting as shipped.
Exemplars: anombyte93/prd-taskmaster: ship-check.py re-executes operator tests in an isolated podman sandbox, fail-closed, emitting SHIP_CHECK_OK exactly once; Gate-6 reachability sweep downgrades ORPHAN modules to scaffold and blocks them
Repos: anombyte93/prd-taskmaster

Definition: A CI script derives headline counts and cross-references from the actual directory tree and fails the build if committed docs (README/CLAUDE.md/manifests) disagree, keeping a large monorepo's self-description from drifting.
Exemplars: alirezarezvani/claude-skills: derive_counters.py --check walks the tree and fails CI if asserted skill/agent/command counts mismatch  •  wshobson/agents: doc_gardener (make garden) flags dead links, stale generated files, oversized skills as a commit gate  •  coreyhaines31/marketingskills: sync-skills.yml regenerates marketplace/plugin/README index FROM the skills folder and self-commits
Repos: alirezarezvani/claude-skills, wshobson/agents, coreyhaines31/marketingskills
